title: Markiplier: You're Welcome
overview: One of YouTube's biggest stars is hitting the road for the first time ever. Comedic vlogger Markiplier has assembled the ultimate cast of characters to guarantee audiences a never-before-seen adventure, live on stage. Markiplier, LordMinion777, Muyskerm, Tyler Scheid and CrankGameplays mix it up together, but the audience is the centerpiece of this spectacle, driving the entire narrative of the show using a combination of "choose your own adventure," improv games, and audience challenges.
